title: Token-opt: deterministic tool-call memoization keyed (cmd, args, tree-SHA) across phases and lanes — repeated identical calls cost zero
summary: CrewAI/DSPy pattern: cycle-scoped memo of deterministic command results (go list, go test on unchanged tree, git status snapshots) shared across phases and sibling lanes via workspace artifacts; also disk-cache advisor/router verdicts keyed on input hash across cycles. GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (oss.md 7, 14; papers.md 5.1).
acceptance: Second identical (cmd,args,tree-SHA) call within a cycle served from memo (test)
advisor verdict cache hit on identical input hash
